edges.condition: project-brief persisted and validated at exact path
draft-summary persisted and validated at exact path
review-notes and review-decision persisted and validated at exact paths; decision is approved or revise-once

roles.name: intake
roles.purpose: Read the source brief and extract topic, audience, and constraints into a project brief.
accepted_tasks: Extract topic, audience, and downstream constraints.
Persist the project brief artifact for drafting.
constraints: Do not merge this role with drafting.
Read only from the approved source root and cited source file.
Capture topic, audience, and constraints explicitly to reduce downstream drift.
Initialize and persist workflow state values folder-name and run-id before writing the first artifact.
Persist project-brief.json using the deterministic workflow path contract and validate the saved file before completion.

completion_rules: Complete only after project-brief is persisted and validated at its exact path.

roles.name: drafting
roles.purpose: Use the project brief to draft the summary.
accepted_tasks: Validate and read the project-brief artifact from its exact path.
Draft a summary that preserves the extracted topic and audience.
Persist the draft summary artifact for review.
constraints: Must remain separate from intake per source non-merge constraint.
Use project-brief as the sole workflow input artifact.
Preserve topic and audience from the project brief.
Persist draft-summary.json using the deterministic workflow path contract and validate the saved file before completion.

completion_rules: Complete only after draft-summary is persisted and validated at its exact path.

roles.name: review
roles.purpose: Review the draft for clarity, completeness, and tone, then approve or request one revision.
accepted_tasks: Validate and read the draft-summary artifact from its exact path.
Produce review notes and a bounded decision of approved or revise-once.
Persist both review artifacts for finalization.
constraints: Approval semantics are bounded to one review decision with at most one requested revision.
Do not produce more than one revision request.
Persist review-notes.json and review-decision.json using deterministic workflow path contracts and validate both saved files before completion.
Review findings must stay grounded in the draft and source-defined criteria: clarity, completeness, and tone.

completion_rules: Complete only after review-notes and review-decision are persisted and validated at their exact paths.

roles.name: finalization
roles.purpose: Apply approved review changes and produce the final summary while preserving topic and audience.
accepted_tasks: Validate and read draft-summary, review-notes, and review-decision from their exact paths.
Apply the approved review changes to produce the final summary.
constraints: Must preserve the topic and audience established upstream.
If review-decision is approved, finalize using the approved draft and any approved review adjustments only.
If review-decision is revise-once, apply exactly one round of requested changes and then finalize.
Do not create a new review cycle or additional approval stage.
Persist final-summary.json using the deterministic workflow path contract and validate the saved file before completion.

completion_rules: Complete only after final-summary is persisted and validated at its exact path.

artifacts.name: project-brief
artifacts.notes: Persist to output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/project-brief.json. Producer must write via save_workflow_artifact.py and validate the saved file. Downstream consumer must validate and read this exact path before processing.

artifacts.name: draft-summary
artifacts.notes: Persist to output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/draft-summary.json. Producer must write via save_workflow_artifact.py and validate the saved file. Review and finalization must validate and read this exact path before processing.

artifacts.name: review-notes
artifacts.notes: Persist to output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/review-notes.json. Producer must write via save_workflow_artifact.py and validate the saved file. Finalization must validate and read this exact path before processing.

artifacts.name: review-decision
artifacts.notes: Persist to output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/review-decision.json. Allowed status values are approved or revise-once. Producer must write via save_workflow_artifact.py and validate the saved file. Finalization must validate and read this exact path before processing.

artifacts.name: final-summary
artifacts.notes: Persist to output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/final-summary.json. Producer must write via save_workflow_artifact.py and validate the saved file before final completion.

handoffs.notes: Drafting must validate and read output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/project-brief.json before work begins.

Review must validate and read output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/draft-summary.json before critique. Finalization must validate and read the same exact path after review artifacts are available.
Finalization must validate and read output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/review-notes.json before applying changes.
Finalization must validate and read output/<folder-name>/<currentdate>/run-<zero-padded-run-id>/review-decision.json before applying changes; stop if status is outside approved or revise-once.

state.name: folder-name
state.notes: Shared run-level folder slug used in every deterministic artifact path. Initialize once before the first artifact write and keep constant for the run.

state.name: run-id
state.notes: Shared monotonic namespace-local zero-padded run identifier used in every deterministic artifact path. Initialize once before the first artifact write and keep constant for the run.

rationale: The source defines four distinct stages with separate deliverables, so the plan preserves four roles.
A review-and-critique pattern is the simplest supported topology that captures generator, reviewer, bounded revision semantics, and explicit approval behavior.
The explicit non-merge constraint between Intake and Drafting is preserved.
The review checkpoint is modeled through review-notes and review-decision artifacts with a revision budget of one.
Finalization remains a distinct role because the source defines it as a separate stage that applies review changes while preserving topic and audience.
risks: Bad extraction during intake can drift downstream drafting.
The single allowed revision creates limited recovery space if review findings are substantial.
Finalization could accidentally alter topic or audience unless constrained by the project brief and review artifacts.
assumptions: The reviewer's approve-or-revise-once decision is fully captured in review-decision and does not require a separate human checkpoint.
Because the source defines only one review stage, finalization performs the bounded post-review revision/final pass rather than creating an additional review loop.
